conditions.description: Participation is restricted to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Legal entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded from participation unless guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
Maximum EU contribution per project is €19,000,000. The indicative total call budget is €38,000,000 for an indicative 2 projects.
Communicable results must be shared with the European R&D community through the AI-on-demand platform as an open access dissemination requirement.

Standard Research and Innovation Action (RIA) consortium composition requirements apply. The topic call extract identifies this as an RIA but does not explicitly state minimum consortium size or country diversity rules; these must be verified against the Horizon Europe General Annexes.
conditions.assumption_note: The call extract identifies this as a Research and Innovation Action (RIA) but does not state specific minimum consortium composition rules (e.g., minimum 3 legal entities from 3 different eligible countries). Standard Horizon Europe RIA consortium rules are assumed based on the declared instrument type. Verification against General Annex B is required before submission.
